name: 240W LED Canopy Light AC 120~277V 0~10V Dimming CCT 5700K
description: The ZION LED USA 240W LED Canopy Light is engineered to deliver high-performance, energy-efficient illumination for large outdoor and commercial environments. With a bright 5700K daylight color temperature and advanced 0–10V dimming capabilities, this fixture provides optimal visibility and customizable brightness. Operating on a wide input voltage range of AC 120–277V and boasting an impressive efficacy of 140 lumens per watt, it combines powerful lighting with significant energy savings. The ZION LED USA 240W LED Canopy Light is the perfect solution for settings requiring high-lumen output, robust construction, and adjustable lighting—ensuring both visibility and efficiency in demanding environments.
short_desc: Features: Power Consumption: 240W Input Voltage: AC 120–277V Dimming: 0–10V dimmable for precise light control Color Temperature: 5700K (daylight-white) Luminous Efficacy: 140 lm/W Construction: Durable design for reliable outdoor performance Applications: Gas Stations Parking Structures Industrial Sites Warehouses Large Outdoor Areas Commercial Facilities
